slides.title: Roadmap Prioritization Framework
slides.textContent:
Roadmap Prioritization Framework
Impact vs. Effort Matrix — Where should you invest next?
Quick Wins
High Impact · Low Effort
Ship FIRST
Max ROI, build momentum
e.g. Onboarding flow
Email automation
Big Bets
High Impact · High Effort
Plan & invest
Strategic initiatives
e.g. API platform
AI personalization
Fill-ins
Low Impact · Low Effort
Batch in sprints
When capacity allows
e.g. UI polish
Minor bug fixes
Time Sinks
Low Impact · High Effort
Avoid or defer
Question assumptions
e.g. Legacy migration
Edge case features
← L O W E F F O R T H I G H E F F O R T →

slides.title: Key Takeaways
slides.textContent:
Key Takeaways
What separates great PMs from the rest
01 Obsess over the customer
Great products solve real pain points backed by deep user research, not assumptions.
02 Measure what matters
Define your North Star metric early and align every sprint to it.
03 Ruthlessly prioritize
Use frameworks like ICE or Impact/Effort to focus on the highest-value work.
04 Ship, learn, iterate
Continuous delivery beats waterfall — small bets compound into big outcomes.
05 Align stakeholders early
Communicate the 'why' behind decisions to build trust and reduce friction.
"The best PMs think like CEOs of their product."
